quantification.why: Nearly every comparison carries a computed figure — e.g. West trailing at $1,414.82 is quantified as 'roughly 65% of North's total,' and units are paired with revenue throughout ('$2,392.00 from only 16 units').

specificity.why: Every recommendation names a product/region with data figures and an action, e.g. 'Push Sprocket upsells; it moves the most units (238) but only $1,130.50 in revenue.'

insight_density.why: The prose surfaces multiple non-obvious, actionable observations, such as the revenue-per-unit inversion where Gadget earns most from 16 units while Sprocket sells 238 units for the least revenue, and West's gap to North.
